prompt: Implement `productExceptSelf(nums: number[]): number[]` that returns an array where each element is the product of all other elements. Do not use division.
canonicalSolution: export function productExceptSelf(nums: number[]): number[] { const n = nums.length; const out = new Array<number>(n).fill(1); let prefix = 1; for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) { out[i] = prefix; prefix *= nums[i]!; } let suffix = 1; for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) { out[i]! *= suffix; suffix *= nums[i]!; } return out; }
